授業目的: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following
到達目標: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following
授業方法: In principle, this class will be face-to-face and all class materials, tasks, and explanations will be posted in a Google Classroom dedicated to this class. However, COIL tasks will include a blend of asynchronous tasks on Padlet and synchronous tasks on Zoom with students based in The Philippines.The course format may include the following:- Individual, pair, and group discussion based on topics that relate to content- Sharing of information, including weekly homework assignments, on Google Classroom- Presentation and homework assignments- All components conducted in English- As a level 2 course, all English tasks expected to be completed at an upper-intermediate level

第1回:
**The following is a schedule of what the course MIGHT look like. Exact contents will depend on student interests and needs, as determined by the needs analysis completed during Startup Week. The schedule below will change if we do a virtual exchange with students in another country**

【Startup Week】  
"Online Class (Task-oriented format)" /《90minutes》

This is the introductory video for this lesson and course (VIDEO LINK) 

Startup Week contents: Class overview, introduction, and tasks. Watch my video and complete tasks assigned in the video
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Introduction to culture: what is Japanese culture?

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》

This week will involve directed online readings and your own personal online research to complete a  journal submission. With the journal, I will check your work within 24 hours before the following class with evaluation; Journal #1
第3回:
【Core Week 2】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》
 
Review homework and flex hour tasks; continuing discussion of culture and cross-cultural etiquette

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
This week will involve directed online readings and your own personal online research to prepare for our COIL task. COIL Zoom #1; Intro videos and Padlet comments.

各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
